creator: Mayra Wendolyne | Low Carb Love
source_text:
CILANTRO JALAPEÑO CHICKEN - ONE PAN MEAL! 🥘 
(High Protein & Delicious) 

Have you tried this yet?! 👀 

All you need is:
Chicken thighs
Avocado oil
Garlic powder
Chili powder
Cumin
Oregano
Paprika
Salt and pepper
Garlic
Cilantro
Lime juice
Green onion
Homemade pickled onions
Avocado
Cumin

That's it... I topped it with my cilantro jalapeño crema and guys this came out so juicy and super flavorful!

Let me know if you will give this a try ❤️

expected.name: CILANTRO JALAPEÑO CHICKEN - ONE PAN MEAL
